description.ko: 기하학적 유리 프리즘을 통해 빛이 근본적인 스펙트럼 요소로 분해되는 과정을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 명확함과 변화를 상징합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of light being broken down into its fundamental spectral components through a geometric glass prism, symbolizing clarity and transformation.

prompt: A macro photograph of a sharp-edged crystal prism resting on a sleek, matte black surface. A singular, intense beam of white light enters from the left, refracting through the glass to cast a vivid, ultra-defined rainbow spectrum across the scene. Ethereal light leaks, chromatic aberration, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, minimalist composition.
